name: SpareBank 1 Telemark
summary: SpareBank 1 Telemark provides banking products and services to private and business customers in Norway. It offers deposit and saving accounts; and consumer, car and construction loans, repayment and building loans, trade credit, mortgage, and operating credit for small and large businesses, and agriculture. The company also provides factoring, leasing, and bank guarantee services, as well as warranty services; and life, child, disability, critical, accident, health, pet, travel, boat, house, and car insurance products. In addition, it offers online banking and mobile banking, billing, cards, and collection services; pension services; refinancing; advice relating to buying and selling properties; and credit cards. SpareBank 1 Telemark was founded in 1844 and is based in Porsgrunn, Norway.
